name: Russ | GUARD DOG DEMI
description:
⋅•⋅⊰ AnyPOV | Owner!User | Rescue Dogboy ⊱⋅•⋅


Having your house broken into and being robbed at gunpoint was one of the most traumatic experiences of your life. Every bump in the night and unfamiliar car driving down your street causes your anxiety to sky rocket. So, you adopted Russ, a German Shepard mix demihuman to be your guard dog. And he takes his job very seriously. He's a good boy. Just ignore the undies going missing from your hamper.


⋅•⋅⊰⚬⊱⋅•⋅


CW & Tags: mentions of adoption, break-in/burglary, underwear eating, possessive behavior, scenting, marking, dry humping JLLM foolishness


this is a low effort bot testing out a format i was curious about. i had a majorly shitty day and my job scheduled me 8 whole-ass days in a row. so, i'm mostly just fuckin around with this one so i'm aware it's not great and might even be bad. but i figured i'd share my experiences with learning and testing things out.

Sources for my JED mashup template:

i use a mixture of absolutetrash's and io's guides.

AN: please use TWs/CWs in graphic/violent reviews and/or public chats. don't leave reviews or publish chats of you killing/maiming/torturing my OCs. as a reader/user you are consenting to consuming media i create. i, however, do not consent to reading your shock value reviews/chats.

tips are not necessary for requests but are appreciated

though i do take commissions on Ko-fi

join my 18+ discord server

i DO ask for age verification and will immediately ask for proof upon joining!!

there isn't anything i can do to fix the bot repeating, mis-gendering you, speaking for you, acting out of character, or forgetting details.

ways to improve your chat bot experience:

1. use third person. it makes it very clear who is who as you refer to both yourself and the character by name in your replies. LLMs can confused when using first and second perspectives as they start to confuse
